title: Crypto Firms Downsize, Blame AI Competition
summary: Gemini and Crypto.com cite AI as reason for downsizing. Some firms abandon crypto for AI's higher profits.

title: Circle CEO Addresses Stablecoin Freeze Policy

title: $25 Million Crypto Stablecoin Exploit
